comment: Österreichische Druckschrift (lesenlernen.at): 3 strokes. 1: vertical spine top→bottom. 2: from center of spine UP-RIGHT to top-right (arm goes outward upward). 3: from center of spine DOWN-RIGHT to bottom-right (arm goes outward downward). Both arms start at the SAME center point on the spine.

strokes.comment: Upper arm: from spine center outward UP to top-right
Lower arm: from spine center outward DOWN to bottom-right
